title: Root vitest.config.ts — @ectropy/shared/* alias resolution from repo root
description: Add a root-level vitest.config.ts so @ectropy/shared/* workspace aliases resolve regardless of vitest invocation cwd. Closes a substrate gap that has been failing 4 tests on main throughout the URO Tier 1 arc and would block PR 1.1 URN namespace reconcile's PHASE_1 vitest gate. Validated via spike: spike/vitest-shared-alias-fix-2026-06-06 (collapse-and-resume terminal; 4/4 alias-failing tests, 110 tests total, GREEN from repo root; zero regressions on per-app invocation). Solution B (vitest.workspace.ts referencing per-app projects) attempted in spike and rejected: apps/mcp-server/vitest.config.ts uses repo-root-relative include paths that break under workspace-context cwd shift, and apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts contains duplicate pool/poolOptions keys that cause double-execution under workspace mode. Solution A (root config with explicit shared alias mirror) is the validated approach. Per-app vitest configs remain authoritative when run from their app dir; root config only adds the shared aliases for root-invocation coverage. NOTE: spike A-2 surfaced two additional substrate items NOT addressed by this deliverable: (a) apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts duplicate pool/poolOptions keys (files FU-EB-VITEST-API-GATEWAY-DUPLICATE-POOL-CLEANUP-1, scope of deliverable β); (b) voxel-stream.spec.ts pre-existing timeout failures on main (files FU-EB-VOXEL-STREAM-SPEC-TIMEOUT-1, scope of deliverable γ). schema-validation.test.ts current-truth.json deprecation also pre-existing (files FU-EB-SCHEMA-VALIDATION-TEST-CURRENT-TRUTH-1, scope of deliverable δ).

outputs.description: Root vitest.config.ts file added at repository root.
acceptanceCriteria: File vitest.config.ts exists at repository root after merge.
File mirrors the @ectropy/shared/* alias entries from apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts (13-entry alias map per spike research), with path.resolve calls adjusted for repo-root __dirname.

File defines NO other vitest options (no test.include, no test.exclude, no globalSetup) — strictly an alias surface for root-invocation coverage. Per-app configs remain authoritative for their own test layouts.
File contains a header comment explaining the resolution problem, why workspace mode was rejected, and that per-app configs remain authoritative.

outputs.description: The 4 alias-failing tests pass when vitest is invoked from repo root.
acceptanceCriteria: npx vitest run apps/api-gateway/src/routes/__tests__/project.routes.test.ts PASSES (no @ectropy/shared/* resolution error).
npx vitest run apps/api-gateway/src/routes/__tests__/speckle.routes.test.ts PASSES.
npx vitest run apps/api-gateway/src/routes/internal/__tests__/uro-ws-auth.route.test.ts PASSES.
npx vitest run apps/api-gateway/src/routes/uro/__tests__/viewer-token.route.test.ts PASSES.

outputs.description: Zero regression on per-app vitest invocation.
acceptanceCriteria: cd apps/api-gateway && npx vitest run still works (per-app config still active in app dir context).
cd apps/mcp-server && npx vitest run still works.
cd apps/web-dashboard && npx vitest run still works.
apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts unchanged.
apps/mcp-server/vitest.config.ts unchanged.
apps/web-dashboard/vitest.config.ts unchanged.
